sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91266" key="ptuxi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτῠχ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slab</tr_>, in sg. as collective, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μαρμάρων πτυχίς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2598.tlg010:p.151B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procop.Gaz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.151B.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀκροστόλιον</ref></xr>, the part of a ship on which the name was inscribed, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.86</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτύξ</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> </sense> </entryFree>
